Value: Supports mood balance
A Cochrane review summarized RCTs showing antidepressant effects vs. placebo in mood disorders. [PubMed]
Promotes restful sleep
Reviewed clinical literature describes 5-HTP as a serotonin precursor with effects on sleep quality. [PubMed]
Reduces mental fatigue
A 6-month RCT in centenarians reported reduced mental and physical fatigue and improved cognitive measures. [PubMed]
Supports aging cognition
Meta-analysis of placebo-controlled trials showed clinical benefit in mild cognitive impairment and early Alzheimer's. [PubMed]
Eases nerve-related discomfort
Two-phase clinical study reported improvements in lumbar disc-associated radiculopathy with oral agmatine. [PubMed]
Modulates glutamate signaling
Reviewed CNS pharmacology positions agmatine as an endogenous neuromodulator of glutamate-driven stress responses. [PubMed]
Supports memory
A 180-day multicenter RCT in mild-to-moderate Alzheimer's reported cognitive improvement vs. placebo. [PubMed]
Boosts physical power
A 6-day RCT in healthy adults reported improvements in lower-body isometric force after Alpha-GPC supplementation. [PubMed]
Eases anxious tension
Demonstrated anxiolytic effects across three independent mouse models of anxiety. [PubMed]
Sharpens memory
Reviewed in pharmacology literature as a cognitive-enhancing pyrrolidone with positive effects on memory. [PubMed]
Lowers stress & cortisol
Significant reductions in serum cortisol and perceived stress vs. placebo in a 60-day double-blind RCT using a high-concentration root extract. [PubMed]
Eases anxiety in healthy adults
Adaptogenic and anxiolytic effects in a randomized study of healthy adults supplementing with KSM-66. [PubMed]
Sharpens memory
Chronic supplementation improved memory consolidation in healthy adults in a 12-week double-blind trial. [PubMed]
Calms an anxious mind
Improved cognitive performance, anxiety, and depression scores in a placebo-controlled trial in older adults. [PubMed]
Sharpens attention
A 28-day RCT in healthy adolescents reported improved attention and psychomotor speed vs. placebo. [PubMed]
Improves verbal memory
A randomized trial reported improvements in verbal memory in healthy older adults with relatively inefficient memory. [PubMed]
Enhances choline uptake
MKC-231 (coluracetam) restored high-affinity choline uptake and improved learning in cholinergically-impaired rats. [PubMed]
Supports acetylcholine synthesis
A companion study reported MKC-231 promoted acetylcholine synthesis and release in animal models of cholinergic deficit. [PubMed]
Boosts exercise tolerance
Cordyceps militaris supplementation improved tolerance to high-intensity exercise in healthy adults. [PubMed]
Improves stamina
A double-blind RCT in older adults reported improvements in metabolic exercise capacity and quality of life. [PubMed]
Upregulates GABA-B receptors
Repeated administration of fasoracetam (NS-105) reversed learned helplessness in rats with effects implicating GABA-B receptor up-regulation. [PubMed]
Studied in mGluR-network ADHD
An open-label trial in adolescents with ADHD and mGluR-network gene variants reported reduced ADHD severity scores. [PubMed]
Eugeroic-class compound
Fladrafinil is part of the eugeroic (wakefulness-promoting) family of compounds developed at Lafon Laboratories alongside adrafinil and modafinil. [PubMed]
Bisfluoro analog of adrafinil
Fladrafinil (CRL-40,941) is the bisfluoroadrafinil structural analog of adrafinil, which is itself a prodrug of modafinil. [PubMed]
Eases stress
Oral GABA reduced stress markers and increased relaxation-associated EEG patterns in healthy adults. [PubMed]
Improves sleep onset
A randomized double-blind trial reported reduced sleep-onset latency in adults with insomnia symptoms. [PubMed]
Calmer focus with caffeine
Combined L-theanine + caffeine improved attention-switching accuracy and reduced susceptibility to distraction. [PubMed]
Eases stress
A 4-week RCT in healthy adults reported reduced stress-related symptoms and improved cognitive measures. [PubMed]
Supports cognitive function
Hericium erinaceus improved cognition scores vs. placebo in adults with mild cognitive impairment over 16 weeks. [PubMed]
Memory in older adults
A 12-week trial in older adults reported improvements in cognitive-function scores after daily oral intake. [PubMed]
Improves sleep quality
Magnesium supplementation improved insomnia severity, sleep efficiency, and onset latency in older adults. [PubMed]
Eases stress & anxiety
A systematic review concluded magnesium reduces subjective anxiety and stress in mild anxiety states. [PubMed]
Falls asleep faster
Meta-analysis of 19 RCTs found melatonin reduced sleep-onset latency and increased total sleep time in primary sleep disorders. [PubMed]
Beats jet lag
Cochrane review of 10 RCTs concluded melatonin is remarkably effective at preventing or reducing jet lag. [PubMed]
Focus under stress
Tyrosine supplementation mitigated working-memory decrements during cold-stress exposure in healthy adults. [PubMed]
Cognition under demands
Reviewed evidence shows tyrosine supplementation supports cognitive performance under stressors and high cognitive load. [PubMed]
Sharpens memory
Studied as a dipeptide nootropic with neuroprotective effects on memory across multiple cognitive models. [PubMed]
Boosts BDNF & NGF
Increased expression of brain-derived neurotrophic factor and nerve growth factor in the rat hippocampus. [PubMed]
Calms anxiety
Reviewed in CNS literature as a GABA-B-acting tranquilizer with documented anxiolytic effects across clinical and preclinical studies. [PubMed]
Supports restful sleep
Same comprehensive review documents phenibut's sedative and sleep-promoting properties at therapeutic doses. [PubMed]
Racetam-family derivative
Phenylpiracetam hydrazide is a carbohydrazide derivative of phenylpiracetam (carphedon), part of the racetam family of pyrrolidone compounds. [PubMed]
Supports cognition in aging
Meta-analysis of double-blind RCTs showed clinical benefit for cognitive impairment across global outcome measures. [PubMed]
Improves brain energetics
Reviewed pharmacology shows effects on membrane fluidity and mitochondrial function relevant to neuronal energy. [PubMed]
Pyrrolidone cognitive enhancer
Pramiracetam (CI-879) facilitated acquisition of a radial-arm maze task in rats, in line with the pyrrolidone class of cognitive enhancers. [PubMed]
Influences hippocampal cholinergic activity
Preclinical work reported pramiracetam altered high-affinity choline uptake in rat hippocampal synaptosomes, suggesting a cholinergic mechanism. [PubMed]
Sharper mental performance
SHR-5 extract improved mental performance under stress in a placebo-controlled trial of students during exam-period stress. [PubMed]
Lifts mild burnout
A 28-day RCT of SHR-5 in adults with stress-related fatigue reported reductions in burnout-associated symptoms. [PubMed]
Memory support
Chronic sulbutiamine improved performance in an object-recognition memory task in rats. [PubMed]
Reduces mental fatigue
Studied in infection-associated asthenia as a thiamine derivative supporting recovery from fatigue. [PubMed]
Boosts endurance
A meta-analysis of human RCTs showed acute taurine supplementation improved endurance-exercise performance. [PubMed]
Supports heart function
Taurine supplementation improved exercise capacity in patients with heart failure in a controlled trial. [PubMed]
Lowers stress & balances mood
Reduced cortisol and improved tension/anger/confusion scores in moderately stressed adults over 4 weeks. [PubMed]
Supports vitality
A 5-week supplementation trial in active seniors reported improved muscular force and well-being. [PubMed]
